home.hero_subtitle: Play, explore and discover the world through interactive geography quizzes.

quiz.which_flag: Which flag belongs to the highlighted country?

learn.title: Learn Geography
learn.subtitle: Educational guides for every continent — countries, capitals, flags and geographic facts. Read first, then try the quiz!
